place_results.title: Sunny Dental Care
place_results.address: 101 Lafayette St Fl 9, New York, NY 10013
place_results.hours_last_updated: Updated by this business 5 weeks ago

posts.description:
How Cosmetic Dentistry Can Improve More Than Just Your Appearance

A confident smile can positively influence social interactions, professional confidence, and overall self-esteem.
Modern cosmetic dentistry focuses on creating natural-looking improvements that complement your facial features while maintaining healthy oral function.
Treatments such as whitening, bonding, veneers, and alignment corrections can address discoloration, uneven spacing, worn teeth, and other cosmetic concerns.

At Sunny Dental Care, cosmetic treatment plans are personalised to achieve balanced, refined, and long-lasting results.
Schedule a consultation today to explore options for enhancing your smile naturally. Open Sundays for your convenience.

Why Tooth Sensitivity Should Never Be Ignored

Sharp discomfort while eating hot, cold, sweet, or acidic foods may seem minor at first, but tooth sensitivity can indicate underlying dental problems.
Sensitivity may result from enamel wear, exposed roots, cavities, cracked teeth, gum recession, or teeth grinding.
Without treatment, the underlying cause may continue progressing and lead to more significant discomfort or structural damage.
Early evaluation helps identify the source of sensitivity and allows treatment to be tailored to your specific needs.

Book your dental consultation today at Sunny Dental Care and protect your smile from worsening dental issues. We’re open Sundays for your convenience.

How Preventive Dental Exams Help Detect Problems Before Symptoms Begin

Many dental conditions develop silently without causing pain in the early stages.
Routine dental exams allow issues such as cavities, gum disease, enamel wear, bite problems, and infections to be identified before they become more serious and expensive to treat.
Preventive care plays an important role in maintaining long-term oral health while helping patients avoid unexpected dental emergencies.

At Sunny Dental Care, comprehensive exams are designed to monitor every aspect of your oral health using modern technology and personalised care.
Schedule your preventive dental visit today and stay ahead of future dental concerns. Open Sundays for your convenience.

Why Replacing Missing Teeth Early Protects Your Jawbone and Bite

When a tooth is lost, the surrounding jawbone no longer receives the stimulation it needs to maintain strength and density.
Over time, this can lead to bone loss, shifting teeth, bite imbalance, and changes in facial structure.
Replacing missing teeth early helps preserve oral function, maintain alignment, and support long-term dental stability.
Modern tooth replacement options are designed to restore both appearance and chewing ability while blending naturally with your smile.

Schedule a consultation at Sunny Dental Care to explore your replacement options and protect your long-term oral health. We’re open Sundays for your convenience.

How Small Dental Cracks Can Lead to Bigger Problems Over Time

Tiny cracks in teeth are often difficult to notice in their early stages. However, even minor fractures can gradually worsen due to daily chewing pressure and temperature changes from food and drinks.
If left untreated, cracked teeth may eventually cause sensitivity, pain while chewing, infection, or structural damage requiring more extensive treatment.
Early diagnosis allows damaged teeth to be stabilised before complications develop.

At Sunny Dental Care, advanced diagnostic technology helps identify hidden cracks and preserve natural teeth whenever possible.
Book your dental examination today to evaluate any discomfort, sensitivity, or bite concerns. Open Sundays for your convenience.

Why Professional Teeth Cleanings Are Essential Even with Good Brushing Habits

Brushing and flossing daily are important, but home care alone cannot fully remove hardened tartar buildup from every area of the mouth.
Over time, plaque and bacteria can accumulate below the gumline and between teeth, increasing the risk of cavities, gum disease, and persistent bad breath.
Professional dental cleanings help remove buildup that regular brushing cannot eliminate while allowing early detection of developing oral health concerns.
Patients throughout SoHo and Lower Manhattan rely on preventive cleanings to maintain healthier teeth and gums year-round.
Schedule your professional dental cleaning today and keep your smile healthy and refreshed. We’re open Sundays for your convenience.

The Long-Term Effects of Teeth Grinding on Your Oral Health

Many people grind or clench their teeth without realising it, especially during sleep. Over time, this excessive pressure can gradually damage teeth, strain the jaw joints, and contribute to headaches or facial discomfort.

Teeth grinding may lead to worn enamel, tooth sensitivity, cracks, gum recession, and bite changes if left untreated.
Early diagnosis allows dentists to identify signs of grinding before permanent damage develops.

At Sunny Dental Care, we provide personalized solutions to help protect your teeth and reduce stress on your jaw and bite.
Book a consultation today to evaluate signs of teeth grinding and protect your long-term oral health. Open Sundays for your convenience.

Why Early Cavity Treatment Helps Prevent More Complex Dental Problems

Tooth decay often starts small and painless, which is why many patients do not realise a cavity is developing until significant damage has already occurred.
When cavities are detected early, treatment is usually simple and conservative. However, delaying care can allow decay to spread deeper into the tooth, increasing the risk of infection, fractures, and the need for root canal treatment or extraction.
Routine dental exams and digital imaging help identify early signs of decay before symptoms worsen.

At Sunny Dental Care, patients across SoHo, Tribeca, Greenwich Village, and Lower Manhattan trust preventive care designed to preserve healthy teeth and reduce long-term dental complications.

Schedule your dental evaluation today and protect your smile before small issues become larger concerns. We’re open on Sundays for your convenience

Are clear aligners effective for adults with mild to moderate alignment issues?

Yes. Clear aligners are highly effective for correcting mild to moderate crowding, spacing, and bite concerns.
They are designed to fit seamlessly into busy lifestyles, offering both comfort and predictable results through customized treatment plans.

Schedule your consultation today. We’re open Sundays.

Can gum disease progress even if there is no pain?

Yes. Gum disease often develops without noticeable discomfort in its early stages. However, it can gradually damage the gums and bone supporting your teeth.
Regular dental visits help detect these issues early and allow timely treatment to prevent progression.

Sunny Dental Care is open on Sundays for your convenience.

summary.snippet: "The office is clean and they offer drinks in reception area."
"All of the staff are super friendly and make the experience comfortable :)"

most_relevant.description: Fantastic appointment here. Was nervous about switching to a new dentist, but I immediately felt like I was in good hands. Dr. Kim was incredibly thorough and explained everything to me. They used a new cleaning technology for my cleaning that was painless! This alone would have made me switch years ago. Also very happy that they have the necessary specialists in-house for my needs.

Sunny Dental Care is wonderful! I have been several times for cleanings, a filling, and a last-minute retainer repair, and every time has been great. The administrative team is super friendly and helpful, the hygienists are thorough and always make me feel very comfortable, and Dr Kim does a great job explaining everything. The office is clean and bright as well!

Thanks to Dr. Park for the root canal! It was quick and surprisingly comfortable. Dr. Park was very warm, and you can tell she’s skilled and calm during the procedure. She made me feel comfortable the whole time. I’ve lived in NY for a decade and this was one of my best dental visits. Definitely recommend.

From the moment you walk in, the entire team is incredibly kind and truly attentive to your individual needs.

What I appreciate most is their commitment to patient comfort. They consistently check in throughout the entire process to ensure you are doing okay and explain exactly what they are doing. They are meticulous about their work and always make sure everything looks perfect before you leave. If you are looking for a dentist who combines genuine care with high-quality service, this is the place to go.

I’ve been to many dental offices over the years, and I’ve finally found one I truly trust. Dr. Daejin Kim and Dr. Jang were attentive and thorough from start to finish, making sure all my needs were met. The entire treatment process was very comfortable, and I’m extremely happy with the results. They were truly impeccable and exceeded my expectations. The office is clean, modern, and comfortable, and the staff are friendly, professional, and very skilled. This is the first dental clinic where I felt genuinely cared for and completely satisfied with the results. Highly recommend Sunny Dental, and I can’t wait for my next appointment!

Super nice and welcoming office! As a new patient due for cleaning, I spent most of my visit with the hygienist James who was very informative, gentle, and answered all my silly questions! All the staff were very helpful as well. Also a goody bag for new patients~

Have been going to Sunny Dental for about 6 years now and they have been great. Started taking my daughter there as well and have no regrets. It’s easy to book / change  appointments. They do good work, are  friendly and easy to ask any questions. They have weekend hours which is fantastic. I recommend them all the time.

I am so happy I was referred to this office. Dr Kim was fantastic, and Annie Tang the hygienist was unbelievably thorough with my cleaning. Also they are one of the few NYC offices with Guided Biofilm Therapy, which does the most gentle cleaning you can imagine: no pain whatsoever. It’s also great that they have an endodontist and periodontist in-office, which means it’s an all in one practice.
